loc.syn: Through on-site coverage, interviews, and field observations, the program presents an authentic look at decision-making processes, challenges faced, and their impact on the community and the organization they lead.
Following this round, Bautista extended his lead in the riders' championship to 74 points over Razgatlioglu.
With this result, Marc Márquez extends his lead in the standings, while Ducati continues to demonstrate its dominance in the sprint format.
This race delivered a dramatic duel among top riders, with relentless battles for position and strategy from the very first corner.
When the heavy storm hits, it wasn't the storm that a family should fear but the people and non-human entities who are out for them.
The Barefoot Immortal is a fairy in ancient Chinese folklore and Taoist legend. According to Chinese folklore, he often comes down to the world to help humans eradicate demons.
An animated program series about the stories of the Prophet told with narration complete with verses.
With Qatar’s iconic night-race atmosphere, fans are treated to breathtaking overtakes, intense rider duels, and thrilling moments all around the track.

Khansa, a gentle and devout woman, navigates life with sacrifices she never chose. Her kindness, however, drags her into a series of wounds, slander, and secrets from her past that are slowly revealed.

Adila's life changed after her beloved younger brother Kamal died in an accident involving Trian, his classmate. Overcome with guilt and loss, Adila had to deal with emotional pain and the burden of her family.

Diandra thought love would save her life. Her marriage to Dimitri instead dragged her into a whirlpool of slander, secrets, and bitter choices that changed everything. With wounds still unhealed, they met again.

The fate of the relationship between Raka (Dimas Aditya) and Kartika (Dinda Kirana) and the relationship between Jodi (Ridho Illahi) and Gladis (Marsha Aruan) turns out to be the same. They are both disapproved by their parents to date. The situation becomes increasingly complicated. Kartika helps Gladis to get to her house. In return, Gladis allows Kartika who comes from Jombang, all the way to meet her boyfriend, Raka, to stay at Gladis's house. and it turns out that Gladis is Raka's neighbor. The problem becomes even more chaotic when Ria (Faye Nicole) arrives.

con.oti: I Love You Full! Bu Dosen

loc.tit: I Love You Full! Bu Dosen
loc.syn: Lela (Sahila Hisyam), a lecturer, punishes her student, Jerry (Jeff Smith), for arriving late. Jerry, who doesn't accept Lela's punishment, always tries to get revenge. Lela is always teased by Jerry every time she teaches. What happens next?
A television film that tells a romantic story of life with interesting conflicts.
A television film that tells a romantic story of life with interesting conflicts.
Each episode features a host and guest stars who share stories, experiences, and solutions grounded in Islamic teachings ranging from marital matters, friendships, to modern social challenges.
Buser is a crime news program on SCTV that highlights various criminal cases occurring across Indonesia.
Airing every morning, it covers national, economic, social, and crime news, along with uplifting stories to start the day.
The show features updates on celebrity lives, including their activities, achievements, and trending gossip.
Participants compete to showcase their vocal skills, stage charisma, and creativity in performing popular dangdut songs.
Instructor Zhang Zhiyong and his wife Yang Man encountered a terrorist attack by international criminals on their flight back to China from a West Asian country.

Zhi Ming, who trains at the Northern Shaolin Temple, teams up with Si Ma Yan, who trains at the Southern Shaolin Temple, to avenge both their fathers’ death by assassinating a corrupt magistrate, leading to a series of fierce battles!

Cantonese hero Fong Sai Yuk joins "The Red Flower" brotherhood to overthrow the Manchurian emperor and restore the Ming dynasty, while dealing with the group's strict rules and romantic complications with two potential wives.
A spiritual shower delivered by Prof. Dr. H. Nasaruddin Umar, MA through a spiritual program entitled "The Door of Heaven"

Fokus Pagi is a morning news program on Indosiar that delivers the latest news from across Indonesia, covering national events, crime, disasters, and social and economic issues, presented concisely to give viewers a quick overview at the start of the day.
Each episode features true or fictional tales that convey values of kindness, love, and friendship, inviting viewers to reflect and appreciate the beautiful moments in life.
A young woman is pulled into a chilling web of rituals, betrayal, and bloodlines connected to an ancient mirror. As dark forces awaken, the boundary between past and present begins to shatter.

Tiger on Beat 2 is a Hong Kong action-comedy film about a reckless young cop teamed up with a cunning prisoner. Despite constant clashes, they must join forces to take down a dangerous crime syndicate in a mix of explosive action and humor.

Determined to make her own path in life, Princess Merida defies a custom that brings chaos to her kingdom. Granted one wish, Merida must rely on her bravery and her archery skills to undo a beastly curse.
Presenting various news stories that have gone viral on social media.
The story of the relationship between the King who is renown for his ruthlessness and his subject who became his trusted steersman.

con.oti: Me & You & A Girl Name Ugly

loc.tit: Me & You & A Girl Name Ugly
